=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (14:3-14:18) TS377092: These 2 consecutive `catchTag` transformations can be collapsed into a single `catchTags` call. effect(multipleCatchTag)
  Fix 0: "Disable multipleCatchTag for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable multipleCatchTag for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable multipleCatchTag for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable multipleCatchTag for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable multipleCatchTag for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable multipleCatchTag for entire file"
